It’s built. Discipline by discipline, choice by choice.
Every action leaves a mark. Every mark raises the standard.
This is how legacy endures, and why these women will lead the future.

Available on SNKRS in select regions on 10.14.

Locked in is an understatement. 

From preparation to performance, they’ve trained together and they’ll shine together. 

Replica leos available now at our link in bio.
